metadata.name: Cert-Manager Issuer (Cloudflare)
metadata.description: Cert-manager Issuer for automatic TLS certificate management using Let's Encrypt with Cloudflare DNS-01 challenge validation. Namespace-scoped (unlike ClusterIssuer).
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Cert-manager Issuer for automatic TLS certificate management using Let's Encrypt with Cloudflare DNS-01 challenge validation. Namespace-scoped (unlike ClusterIssuer).

## How to Use
This template renders `main.yaml` as a file.

1. Start with the resource name, namespace, and any required networking or storage settings.
2. Fill in required fields first, then enable optional sections such as TLS, annotations, or extra selectors only when they match your cluster setup.
3. Render the manifest and apply it to the target cluster after confirming the generated resource matches your platform conventions.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `resource_name`: Resource Name; optional; default: cloudflare-issuer.
- `namespace`: Namespace; optional; default: default.
- `acme_email`: Email address for ACME account registration; optional.
- `acme_server`: ACME server URL; optional; default: https://acme-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory.
- `privatekey_secret_name`: Name of secret to store ACME account private key; optional; default: cloudflare-issuer-account-key.
- `api_token_secret_name`: Name of secret containing Cloudflare API token; optional; default: cloudflare-api-token-secret.
- `api_token_secret_key`: Key name in secret containing Cloudflare API token; optional; default: api-token.

### Resource Limits
- `resources_enabled`: Enable resource limits and requests; optional; default: false.
- `resources_cpu_limit`: CPU limit; optional; default: 100m.
- `resources_cpu_request`: CPU request; optional; default: 50m.
- `resources_memory_limit`: Memory limit; optional; default: 128Mi.
- `resources_memory_request`: Memory request; optional; default: 64Mi.

### Traefik Integration
- `traefik_enabled`: Enable Traefik integration; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_host`: Traefik host; optional.
- `traefik_domain`: Traefik domain; optional.
- `traefik_tls_enabled`: Enable TLS; optional; default: true.
- `traefik_tls_certresolver`: TLS certificate resolver; optional; default: letsencrypt-prod.

## References
- [Cloudflare DNS-01 Challenge](https://cert-manager.io/docs/configuration/acme/dns01/cloudflare/)
- [cert-manager](https://cert-manager.io)
## Pre-Requisites
- cert-manager installed in the cluster
- A Cloudflare API token with DNS edit permissions
